summary: Code review and frontend verification of SalesInvoicePrint.jsx modifications. All 7 required changes verified: Khayratna logo, font size increases, monochrome template, 20-row support, and multi-page print CSS rules. Both SalesInvoicePage and SalesReturnPage correctly import and use the component.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - low priority, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: SalesInvoicePrint.jsx correctly implements all 7 required changes:
1. LOGO_BASE64 constant (line 4): Base64 PNG of Khayratna logo embedded at component top
2. Font sizes increased by 2px: body 13px, header h2 16px, header p 12px, title 20px, table th/td 12px, totals 13px, grand total 15px
3. Monochrome colors verified: All colors use #000 (black), #fff (white), #eee (light gray) - no blue #1a2744, no red asterisks
4. 20-row support (lines 52-64): emptyRows = Math.max(0, 20 - lines.length) fills table to 20 rows
5. CSS @media print rules (lines 163-168): table-header-group for thead ensures repeating headers on multi-page
6. SalesInvoicePage.jsx import (line 12) and usage (lines 294-305) verified correct
7. SalesReturnPage.jsx import (line 12) and usage (lines 307-324) verified correct
printInvoice() function correctly uses window.open('', '_blank') and document.write(html) pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: SalesInvoicePrint.jsx template modifications verified. Component is a hook-like function returning { printInvoice }. Key implementation details: base64 logo at line 4 (LOGO_BASE64), font sizes in CSS styles (lines 77-160), monochrome colors throughout, 20-row padding in lines 52-64, and @media print CSS for multi-page at lines 163-168.

khayratna_logo_base64.details: LOGO_BASE64 constant defined at line 4, used in tag at line 182 with data:image/png;base64 prefix and alt='Khayratna'

font_size_increases.details: All fonts increased by 2px: body 13px (line 79), header h2 16px (line 97), header p 12px (line 98), title 20px (line 105), table th 12px (line 137), table td 12px (line 140), totals 13px (line 149), grand total 15px (line 152)

monochrome_template.details: All colors are black (#000), white (#fff), or light gray (#eee). No blue #1a2744 colors. Taxable asterisk uses font-weight:bold instead of red color.

twenty_row_support.details: Line 53: const emptyRows = Math.max(0, 20 - lines.length). Empty rows HTML generated in lines 54-64.

multipage_print_css.details: Lines 131 and 166: table.items thead { display: table-header-group; } ensures headers repeat on each printed page

sales_invoice_page_integration.details: Line 12: import SalesInvoicePrint. Lines 294-305: handlePrint() correctly calls SalesInvoicePrint({invoice, organization, customer}).printInvoice()

sales_return_page_integration.details: Line 12: import SalesInvoicePrint. Lines 307-324: handlePrint() correctly calls SalesInvoicePrint({invoice: {...ret}, organization, customer}).printInvoice()
